1-visibility.note: Live mode indicators, ghost gap display, replay clock

4-consistency.note: daisyUI consistent; radius values drift from token scale

5-error-prevention.note: Token validation; no confirm on destructive actions

6-recognition.note: KB shortcuts hidden in details; ghost concepts assume domain knowledge

7-flexibility.note: KB shortcuts exist but hidden; sport filtering solid

9-error-recovery.note: Toast feedback; no undo on ghost/HR import

10-help.note: Dashboard tour, keyboard hints, docs page

warnings.reason: border-left color changes semantically per training-load band (band-good/band-bad/band-accent/band-info) — carries functional meaning
Animating width triggers layout recalc per frame; replace with transform: scaleX()

issues.title: Eyebrow overuse flattens hierarchy
issues.description: The `.eyebrow` class appears above 4+ sections on the dashboard ('CORE SUMMARY', 'WORKOUTS', 'RECORDS & GOALS', 'ADVANCED ANALYSIS'). Keep one — the rest should let h2 headings stand alone.

issues.title: transition: width causes layout thrash in replay
issues.description: Animating width triggers layout recalculations per frame. Replace with transform: scaleX() or compositor-only approach.

issues.title: Radius drift from design system
issues.description: Six hardcoded border-radius values (2px, 3px, 4px, 6px, 8px) fall outside the DESIGN.md scale (ctrl: 0.625rem, card: 1rem, pill: 999px).

issues.title: Keyboard shortcuts buried in <details>
issues.description: Space/arrow shortcuts are hidden behind a collapsible element. Surface top 2-3 shortcuts as an inline hint near the scrub bar.

issues.title: Ghost mode options overwhelm first-timers
issues.description: Four comparison modes presented simultaneously. Progressive disclosure: default 'None', surface 'Past Session' when candidates exist, tuck the rest.

browserVisualization.reason: Dev server failed to start (missing node_modules in worktree)
